Noclin`s Pet  

Summoned
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded August 13th, 2007 by __DEL__1641773856190

  • Type: Summoned
  • Race: Skeleton
  • Placeholder is: a decaying skeleton
  • This mob spawns at /waypoint 000 at the middle of the newbie area in Paineel.
  • Faction:
  • Attackable: Yes
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: EverQuest | Skeleton (EQ Mob Race) | Templatized | Summoned (EQ Mob Type)
This page last modified 2026-04-12 15:03:37.

Level: 5
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Rotting Femur

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Quests:
  The Lost Pet

Report a correction

Post Comment
lvl 5?
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 5:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254801724
39 posts
I ran to paineel with my newly lvl 22 DE sk because it's quicker from the spires than to go all the way to nek =P .. I was running around in the newbie pit when I saw TWO of these.. BOTH con'd WHITE (lvl 22/even) to me.. I made pet attacked first one, zapped with HT .. let pet hold off the second as I zon'd since some how I got quad hit >.< mean sucky things.. and the one I did kill poofed.
▲ Page top
found him early
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 8:49 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I had no problem finding him he found me so it was easy
▲ Page top
noclins pet
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 7:16 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I saw him once at level to on the hill to the right of the entrace ( facing away from the way yopu come in from paineel). I treid to get closer to get a better look, but at that time I did not know that he was KoS. So I got my *** kicked. I was level 2 at the time.
▲ Page top
F.Y.I.
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 10:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Okay, Here is what you do to get the pe to spawn, where? I dont know, he showed up in different places for me. First, go talk to Noclin, then summon a pet(if your a necro, makes the whole thing easier!) then go out and look for him. Its best to group with somebody that way you can find him faster.
▲ Page top
Possibly Placeholder(s)
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 9:11 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
A couple guys and I got him to pop a couple times just by killing wave after wave of skellies. I dont know if it was a coincidence or not, but the three of us cleared the area of skellies about 3 or 4 times and he popped twice in about an hour or so.

I dunno though... coulda been a coincidence.
▲ Page top
RE: Possibly Placeholder(s)
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 1:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757879139
4 posts
I would like to add that this may be the case. I spent levels 1-5 in the Paineel newbie area one night and never saw him spawn until a higher level SK asked me for bone chips. I slaughtered all skellies in the area until I had about 2 stacks and he spawned near the first little hill on the left when you come into the newbie area from Paineel.
▲ Page top
lvl
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2001 at 11:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249851877
42 posts
he is ALWAYS lvl 4 unlike the bestiary states
▲ Page top
Noclin's Pet
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2001 at 7:53 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He is extremely rare, I spent 3 hours in Paineel just looking for the pet. I tried all the strategies here but haven't seen it once, I started looking when I hit level 4 and no luck, have made a pretty penny selling all the bone chips though. :)
▲ Page top
Noclins Pet
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 3:55 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Noclins Pet doesn't spawn on the hill with only 1 tree. Ratula
▲ Page top
Noclins Pet
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 6:28 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Noclins Pet is a lvl mob. He conned blue to my level 5. As for the spawn rate, it's hard to tell. I got the quest many times and could not get the pet to pop. I saw him at 6 P.M. game time and logged in when the sever only had approx. 600 people. Then just killed every skeleton I could see.
▲ Page top
Noclins Pet
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2000 at 7:52 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
To answer the questions about spawning, Noclins pet spawns everytime you get the quest from Noclin. no more no less
▲ Page top
Noclins pet
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2000 at 10:39 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Forgot to add that he can drop up to 5 gold piece and is soloed easily at L5 wthout a pet.
▲ Page top
the True info
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2000 at 10:38 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Noclins pet is 100% L4 I killed him 10 times, is even at 4 blue at 5, and his placeholders are decaying skels, he spawns together wth them, decaying skels spawn 3 at once, and he will spawn in place of one of them.
▲ Page top
This pet can be level 4
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2000 at 7:47 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
▲ Page top
Noclin's Femur
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2000 at 8:08 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
To answer ur question he spawns less than 5 minutes after u get the quest from Noclin. He spawns on that little hill to Noclin's Left with only one tree. BTW the weapon only Procs at level 10, and does Sicken, if ya didn't know already.
▲ Page top
RE: Noclin's Femur
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2000 at 6:14 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous

QuoteReply

proc is at lvl 10...you prolly know that already tho

Noclin's Pet
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2000 at 7:15 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It's not that rare. the first time i tried for one it took about 4 hours...after that i've seen 3 spawn in 5 minutes...no joke...of course i didn't need it those times, but i killed it anyway and made a few newbie necros very happy :)

# Nov 08 2002 at 7:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782684203
38 posts
hmm, when i made my erudite necro and my brother and his friend made a sk and a cleric, we found noclin's pet a bunch of times, like 10 times in a hour. lol we would know cause we got our *** kicked by him alot at lvl 1. i dont know if someone triggered the spawn or anything tho. anyways, the point of my story is....unlike other people i didn't find him rare. and they lived happily ever after....
